title: stelis coroicensis
intro: Stelis coroicensis, a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. Stelis coroicensis has been traditionally used to aid in the relief of coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as to lower fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Stelis coroicensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health problems.
